name: What's the time limit to report my ladder fall injury from work in Boise?
description: Report employer now (days), file claim within 180 days UT/1 yr ID—don't wait!

mainEntity.name: What's the time limit to report my ladder fall injury from work in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report employer now (days), file claim within 180 days UT/1 yr ID—don't wait!
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Utah: 180 days to file claim; Idaho: 1 year from accident or symptom knowledge.**[1][8]

Delays risk denial, even if not your fault—insurers use this defense often.

- Report to employer within 7-30 days depending on state.
- Medical records start the clock if symptoms delayed.

Track deadlines strictly; pre-existing conditions don't bar claims if work aggravated them.[6]

Attorneys file extensions if needed and prevent technical denials.
